# Log40

Personal blog sharing insights on software engineering, web development, and systems programming.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://log40.runflare.run/) - Main page containing articles on Linux, backend systems, database engineering, and AI.
- [Store](https://log40.runflare.run/store) - Digital store providing high-performance configuration templates, developer assets, and PDF files.
- [About](https://log40.runflare.run/about) - Personal bio and professional background of Toghrol as a systems and Rust developer.
